title: Splunk Filters
overview: - | eventcount summarize=false index=→ see the available indexes. - | eventcount summarize=false index= | stats sum(count) as eventcount by index | sort - eventcount → Displays the number of events in each index, sorted in descending order. - index=whatever → Searches the whatever Splunk logs. - | metadata type=sourcetypes → Retrieves a list of all sourcetyp

study.overview: - | eventcount summarize=false index=→ see the available indexes. - | eventcount summarize=false index= | stats sum(count) as eventcount by index | sort - eventcount → Displays the number of events in each index, sorted in descending order. - index=whatever → Searches the whatever Splunk logs. - | metadata type=sourcetypes → Retrieves a list of all sourcetyp
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.

splunkExamples.code:
sourcetype=stream:http
| stats count dc(uri_path) as distinct_paths sum(bytes_in) as total_bytes_in sum(bytes_out) as total_bytes_out by src_ip, dest_ip
| eval total_bytes=total_bytes_in+total_bytes_out
| sort -count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, count, distinct_paths, total_bytes_in, total_bytes_out, total_bytes

index=security EventCode=4625
| stats count by src_ip, user
| where count > 10
| sort -count
| table src_ip, user, count

index=windows EventCode=4688
| stats count by user, New_Process_Name
| sort -count
| table user, New_Process_Name, count

index=windows EventCode=4104 CommandLine="*Invoke-Mimikatz*"
| table _time, user, CommandLine

importantCommands.code:
index=windows EventCode=4688
| search CommandLine="*wmic*"
| stats count by user, CommandLine
| table user, CommandLine, count
